context: Agent evaluates four requests against the skill's 'Do NOT use for' section and recommends correct tools.

checklist.name: Request 1 correctly declined (issue tracker)
checklist.description: tool-selection.md states that Request 1 (JIRA bug) is NOT appropriate for a context file and recommends an issue tracker.

checklist.name: Request 2 correctly declined (code comment)
checklist.description: tool-selection.md states that Request 2 (source file explanation) is NOT appropriate for a context file and recommends a code comment.

checklist.name: Request 3 correctly declined (README/docs)
checklist.description: tool-selection.md states that Request 3 (permanent API design docs) is NOT appropriate for a context file and recommends README or /docs.

checklist.name: Request 4 correctly approved as scratch
checklist.description: tool-selection.md approves Request 4 as a valid scratch file (temporary exploratory notes).

checklist.name: Reasoning references skill rules
checklist.description: Each decision references the relevant 'Do NOT use for' rule or type selection rule from the skill.
